planet.name: Neptune
planet.description: The windy blue giant at the edge of the solar system. A world of supersonic storms and deep azure clouds. The furthest outpost of the Deep Space Observatories.

moons.name: Triton
moons.description: Neptune's largest moon. A captured object with a retrograde orbit and cryovolcanic activity. Home to the furthest continuously inhabited station in the solar system, Triton Research Base.
